name: Star Map 25 — Imperium Investigation Grid
description: 25 star systems across the Segmentae Majoris. Investigate each point to earn game_points and unlock lore. Warhammer 40,000 themed.
info: First Starmap 25: Segmentum fortresses and Legion homeworlds. Each investigation awards game_points.

changelog.notes: Added point metadata, deterministic 3D/4D coordinates, segmentum metadata, extended lore, canon links, and gameplay tags.

Solar.description: The imperial core around Terra, Mars, and the oldest fortified approaches to the Throneworld.
Solar.completion_requirement: Investigate and secure all Solar systems on the map.

Obscurus.description: The northern and Eye-facing frontier, defined by fortress worlds, ruins, and traitor-legion scars.
Obscurus.completion_requirement: Investigate and secure all Obscurus systems on the map.

Pacificus.description: The western naval approaches, represented here by Hydraphur and fleet logistics.
Pacificus.completion_requirement: Investigate and secure all Pacificus systems on the map.

Tempestus.description: The southern stormward marches, represented by Bakka and hardened naval estates.
Tempestus.completion_requirement: Investigate and secure all Tempestus systems on the map.

Ultima.description: The eastern frontier and Ultramar-linked expanse, rich with loyalist chapter worlds and forge engines.
Ultima.completion_requirement: Investigate and secure all Ultima systems on the map.

terra_sol.lore_long: Terra is the political and spiritual anchor of the Imperium, a throneworld whose importance exceeds every military ledger. Its presence on the map should feel like the fixed point around which all other investigations orbit.

mars_sol.lore_long: Mars is the forge heart of Segmentum Solar, binding Mechanicus production to Imperial survival. Building and deployment bonuses naturally favor forge and fortress mechanics here.

cypra_mundi.lore_long: Cypra Mundi anchors Segmentum Obscurus as a fleet and fortress hub facing unstable northern approaches. It is a natural keystone for Obscurus completion.

hydraphur.lore_long: Hydraphur represents the Pacificus naval machine: fleets, admiralty politics, and western-route pressure. Temporary revolt events fit this system because naval control is its strategic value.

bakka.lore_long: Bakka is a Tempestus strongpoint where hereditary naval estates and fleet doctrine make the system disciplined and hard to dislodge. It is the southern fortress marker for completion rules.

kar_duniash.lore_long: Kar Duniash marks the eastern fleet frontier, a logistical guarantor for a sprawling and turbulent Ultima region. Its location makes it the Segmentum Ultima fortress point.

macragge.lore_long: Macragge is Ultramar's capital and a loyalist command symbol, making it one of the strongest progression targets in the eastern map. Its lore supports both chapter identity and regional governance.

fenris.lore_long: Fenris is a death world whose mythic ecology and Space Wolves culture make it feel more like a saga than a survey point. Its xenos tag marks the dangerous nonstandard biosphere line used by map filters.

cadia.lore_long: Cadia is both fortress and wound: a fallen gate whose loss reshaped the galaxy. On the map it behaves like a high-priority scar for fortress and traitor-adjacent filters.

baal.lore_long: Baal carries Blood Angels identity through radiation, red thirst, and siege memory. Its hostile ecology and Tyranid pressure make it a natural xenos-threat marker.

nocturne.lore_long: Nocturne is Vulkan's volcanic crucible, a place where craft, survival, and civilian defense shape Salamanders identity. Forge-adjacent play should feel natural here.

medusa.lore_long: Medusa is harsh, mobile, and machine-haunted, matching the Iron Hands' obsession with strength through augmentation. Its forge tag supports Mechanicus and industrial bonuses.

olympia.lore_long: Olympia is a destroyed origin point for siegecraft and bitterness, tied to Perturabo and the Iron Warriors. Treat it as both fortress doctrine and traitor memory.

caliban.lore_long: Caliban's destruction leaves the Dark Angels with a permanent secrecy wound. Its forest-beast legacy and betrayal history justify legion, xenos, and traitor-adjacent filtering.

chogoris.lore_long: Chogoris is speed, storm, and open horizon: the White Scars' cultural engine. It gives Ultima progression a mobile, nomadic contrast to fortress and forge systems.

barbarus.lore_long: Barbarus is poison atmosphere and Death Guard origin, defined by oppression, endurance, and decay. It is a strong traitor and xenos hazard marker for filters and events.

chemos.lore_long: Chemos began as a strained industrial world and became the origin of Fulgrim's pursuit of perfection. Its forge-like industrial identity sits under a traitor flag.

colchis.lore_long: Colchis is the religious wound behind the Word Bearers, a world where faith became rebellion. It reads as a narrative-heavy traitor node rather than a military fortress.

nostramo.lore_long: Nostramo is urban darkness and terror doctrine, destroyed by Curze but still central to Night Lords identity. Its map role is fear, crime, and punitive collapse.

prospero.lore_long: Prospero is scholarship, sorcery, and catastrophe. The Burning of Prospero makes it both legion homeworld and traitor scar, with warp-adjacent hazard value.

cthonia.lore_long: Cthonia is dangerous because of proximity: a mined-out cradle of Horus near the Sol system. Its traitor tag next to the throneward core makes it strategically tense.

deliverance.lore_long: Deliverance is rebellion turned doctrine, the Raven Guard's moon of liberation and shadow warfare. It gives the map a stealth and uprising theme without requiring traitor alignment.

nuceria.lore_long: Nuceria is the wound behind Angron: gladiator pits, betrayal, and the Nails. It acts as a traitor and violence marker for events and sorting.

inwit.lore_long: Inwit is cold discipline and fortress culture, fitting Rogal Dorn's defensive identity. It belongs near the Solar cluster as a loyalist stronghold.

ryza.lore_long: Ryza is a major forge world associated with plasma mastery and Mechanicus output. It gives Ultima a clean forge target for building, deploy, and event bonuses.

points.name: Sol System (Terra)
points.info: Throneworld. Holy Terra; heart of the Imperium.
points.lore: Capital of the Imperium of Man. The Emperor sits upon the Golden Throne.

points.name: Sol System (Mars)
points.info: Segmentum Solar fortress. Adeptus Mechanicus. Forge World.
points.lore: Red Planet. Seat of the Mechanicus; Segmentum Fleet HQ.

points.name: Cypra Mundi System
points.info: Segmentum Obscurus fortress world.
points.lore: Segmentum Obscurus fleet headquarters. North of the galaxy.

points.name: Hydraphur System
points.info: Segmentum Pacificus fortress. Naval base.
points.lore: Lords of Hydraphur. Western Segmentum fortress.

points.name: Bakka System
points.info: Segmentum Tempestus fortress. Hereditary estates.
points.lore: Southern Segmentum. Bakka fleet headquarters.

points.name: Kar Duniash System
points.info: Segmentum Ultima fortress. Turbulent eastern frontier.
points.lore: Ultima Segmentum guarantor. Many lost worlds in the east.

points.name: Macragge System (Ultramar)
points.info: Ultramarines homeworld. Capital of Ultramar. 400 million.
points.lore: Home of the Ultramarines. Only world besides Terra and Mars allowed dominion over other worlds.

points.name: Fenris System
points.info: Space Wolves homeworld. Death world; ice and sea.
points.lore: Feral world. Home of the Vlka Fenryka — Space Wolves.

points.name: Cadian System
points.info: Cadian Gate. Destroyed 999.M41. Fortress world.
points.lore: The Gate broke. Cadia fell; the Great Rift opened.

points.name: Baal System
points.info: Blood Angels homeworld. Rad-wastes and Chapter keep.
points.lore: Sanguinius. The Blood Angels and the Red Thirst.

points.name: Nocturne System
points.info: Salamanders homeworld. Volcanic; tectonic instability.
points.lore: Vulkan's forge. Salamanders defend the people of Nocturne.

points.name: Medusa System
points.info: Iron Hands homeworld. High gravity; harsh.
points.lore: Ferrus Manus. The Gorgon; flesh is weak.

points.name: Olympia System
points.info: Iron Warriors (traitor) homeworld. Destroyed.
points.lore: Perturabo. Olympia was razed; the IVth turned traitor.

points.name: Caliban System
points.info: Dark Angels homeworld. Destroyed; Lion El'Jonson.
points.lore: Forest world lost to betrayal. The Rock is all that remains.

points.name: Chogoris System
points.info: White Scars homeworld. Feral; nomadic tribes.
points.lore: Jaghatai Khan. The Khagan; plains and storms.

points.name: Barbarus System
points.info: Death Guard (traitor) homeworld. Toxic atmosphere.
points.lore: Mortarion. Poison skies; the Death Guard embrace decay.

points.name: Chemos System
points.info: Emperor's Children (traitor) homeworld. Industrial.
points.lore: Fulgrim. Perfection and excess; the IIIrd fell to Slaanesh.

points.name: Colchis System
points.info: Word Bearers (traitor) homeworld. Destroyed.
points.lore: Lorgar. First to worship the Emperor — then the Dark Gods.

points.name: Nostramo System
points.info: Night Lords (traitor) homeworld. Destroyed by Curze.
points.lore: Konrad Curze. Eternal night; the VIIIth terror.

points.name: Prospero System
points.info: Thousand Sons (traitor) homeworld. Burned by the Wolves.
points.lore: Magnus. The Burning of Prospero; the Rubric.

points.name: Cthonia System
points.info: Luna Wolves / Sons of Horus. Near Terra; mined out. Destroyed.
points.lore: Horus. So close to Terra; the Warmaster's cradle.

points.name: Lycaeus System (Deliverance)
points.info: Raven Guard. Deliverance is the moon; Corax.
points.lore: Corvus Corax. Slaves freed; the XIXth strike from shadow.

points.name: Nuceria System
points.info: World Eaters (traitor). Gladiator pits; Angron's Nails.
points.lore: Angron. The Nails; the XIIth's rage.

points.name: Inwit System
points.info: Imperial Fists. Dorn's upbringing; ice and fortresses.
points.lore: Rogal Dorn. The Praetorian; the Fists hold the line.

points.name: Ryza System
points.info: Forge World. Plasma technology; Adeptus Mechanicus.
points.lore: Major Forge World. Plasma reactors and holy engines.
